videos.title: Trans Lapland | Mythical Roads
videos.description:
🔥 Watch the full episode👉 https://ept.ms/Translapland

⭕️ Get 10 videos FREE with just your email at #EpochTV 👉 https://ept.ms/3j1W0gX
⭕️ Subscribe to our unique new platform👉  EpochTV.com

In this episode, we follow a big imaginary loop and make it come to life, a circuit of more than 3,200 kilometers, the Trans-Laponia, a road without night.

During this circuit, we discover some unusual lifestyles along the shores of the Barents Sea and of the Baltic. In Turku, we meet Jenna and her tango gang, as well as Terho Inkinen, the last fisherman to uphold a thousand-year-old tradition of wood-smoked herring in the Rauma area. Each night, the sun continues its recital between the clouds—harbingers of a change in the weather but also a change of landscape.

About Mythical Roads:

Whether remote or packed with tourists, recent or old, famous or forgotten, certain routes are paved with legends. This series explores itineraries that have made history across five continents—some roads and rivers that separated countries, and others that formed links, creating pathways for traders, fortune-seekers, evangelists, conquerors, and travelers. As historical symbols, these routes now ignite the imaginations of millions of people in search of adventure and freedom.

The original and poetic approach of this series casts a new light on these mythical roads. Throughout the journey, the routes unfold through the eyes of the men and women who live and work along them, and who continue to sustain the legends.

Personal adventures alternate with extraordinary explorations, unforgettable encounters, and surprising developments.

#tradition #landscape #BarentsSea

videos.title: The Road of Bushmen
videos.description:
🔥 Watch the full episode👉 https://ept.ms/TheRouteoftheBushmen

⭕️ Get 10 videos FREE with just your email at #EpochTV 👉 https://ept.ms/3j1W0gX
⭕️ Subscribe to our unique new platform👉  EpochTV.com

In the lands of southern Africa, we find one of the world’s oldest peoples: the Bushmen—hunter-gatherers, nomads with a tragic destiny, and today nearly extinct.

When the first Europeans entered at the Cape, the Bushmen and their cousins, the Khoi, fled them and migrated ever northward.

In this episode, we will follow in their footsteps right to the Kalahari Desert, where the last Bushmen have found refuge.

#SouthernAfrica #Bushmen #KalahariDesert

videos.title: Finlandia Ski Marathon - Lakeland News at Ten - February 15, 2013
videos.transcript:
cross country ski enthusiasts will get
the chance to ski with International
skiers as well as former Olympians this
weekend near Bemidji the 32nd Finlandia
ski Marathon starts at 10 tomorrow
morning the event will include three
separate races some of the courses will
be for more seasoned skiers but others
will be just for for beginners and an
area will also be set up for those who
wish to relax and just watch the race
the trails are in the best condition
that we've ever seen and and our current
board has been a pretty solid Board of
you know eight people who have been
there for about 12 to 15 years and in
our recollection this is our best year
that we've ever had for snow if you've
enjoyed this segment of Lakeland news
please consider making a tax deductible
contribution to Lakeland Public
Television

videos.title: Speed Skating Marathon | Luleå, Sweden | Trans World Sport
videos.description:
Trans World Sport headed to Luleå in Sweden to catch up with the third of five races in the KPN Speed Skating Grand Prix series. Skating on the frozen ocean, the Dutch skaters raced for 100 kilometers in bitter conditions.

Subscribe to Trans World Sport: http://goo.gl/5kBsQ

TWS features sports action from around the globe, including reports from the biggest international competitions, in-depth features on lesser-known sports and profiles of rising stars of the future.

Follow us:
http://twitter.com/TransWorldSport
Like us on Facebook:
http://www.facebook.com/transworldsport87
